docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-03-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT INSERILLO, ANTONY AKA ANTONY INZERILLO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,050.00 FILED BY MADGELENO, CLAUDIA AS TO DEFENDANT INSERILLO, ANTONY AKA ANTONY INZERILLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MADGELENO, CLAUDIA AS TO DEFENDANT INSERILLO, ANTONY AKA ANTONY INZERILLO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. SPANISH INTERPRETER---ELLEN ROSENTHAL WAS PRESENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
